metaTitle: Bee Removal NYC | Humane Bee Relocation | The Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Humane bee removal and relocation in NYC. Safe removal of bee colonies from walls, attics, and structures. Licensed exterminators. Call now.
h1: Bee Removal in NYC — Humane, Safe, and Complete
heroParagraph: Honeybees are essential pollinators and not naturally aggressive — but a colony inside a wall void, attic, or chimney is still a problem that needs professional attention. A mature honeybee colony can contain 50,000 bees and produce enough honeycomb to cause structural damage and attract other pests. We specialize in live bee removal and relocation when possible, and provide complete colony extraction with structural repair guidance when needed.

faqs.q: Do you kill bees or relocate them?
faqs.a: When the situation allows, we prefer live removal and relocation to local beekeepers. However, when bees are established inside a wall or structure, full extraction is required — relocation alone leaves comb and honey that attracts new swarms and other pests. We assess each situation and recommend the most humane effective approach.
